title: Annual Charity Gala for Literacy Program

all.en: The Brightpath Literacy Foundation cordially invites you to attend our 12th Annual Charity Gala Dinner, an evening dedicated to celebrating the transformative power of reading.
all.zh: 光徑識字基金會誠摯邀請您出席我們第十二屆年度慈善晚宴，這是一個專為慶祝閱讀變革力量而舉辦的夜晚。

all.en: As a registered nonprofit organization, Brightpath has spent over a decade equipping underserved children and adults with the literacy skills necessary to thrive in school, the workplace, and everyday life.
all.zh: 作為一個立案的非營利組織，光徑十多年來致力於為弱勢兒童與成人提供在學校、職場與日常生活中茁壯成長所需的識字技能。

all.en: Our mission is straightforward: to ensure that every member of our community, regardless of age or background, has access to high-quality reading instruction and learning materials free of charge.
all.zh: 我們的宗旨很簡單：確保社區中的每一位成員，無論年齡或背景，都能免費獲得高品質的閱讀指導與學習教材。

all.en: Thanks to the extraordinary generosity of last year's donors, we raised more than 480,000 dollars, which enabled us to expand our after-school tutoring program to seventeen additional schools.
all.zh: 由於去年捐贈者非凡的慷慨解囊，我們募得超過四十八萬美元，使我們得以將課後輔導計畫擴展至另外十七所學校。

all.en: Over 2,300 beneficiaries, including 1,800 elementary students and 500 adult learners, directly benefited from these contributions during the past fiscal year.
all.zh: 在過去的會計年度，超過二千三百位受益人，包括一千八百名小學生與五百名成人學員，直接受惠於這些捐款。

all.en: This year's gala will be held on Saturday, October 18, from 6:30 p.m. to 10:30 p.m., at the Grand Riverside Ballroom located at 285 Harbor Avenue, downtown Westbrook.
all.zh: 今年的晚宴將於十月十八日週六晚間六點三十分至十點三十分舉行，地點位於西布魯克市中心海港大道二八五號的河畔大宴會廳。

all.en: The evening will feature a three-course gourmet dinner prepared by award-winning chef Marcus Whitfield, followed by live entertainment from the renowned Harborview String Quartet.
all.zh: 當晚將提供由得獎主廚馬庫斯．惠特菲爾德烹製的三道式美食晚餐，隨後由著名的海景弦樂四重奏帶來現場演出。

all.en: Individual tickets are priced at 175 dollars per person, while reserved tables seating ten guests are available for 1,600 dollars, offering modest savings for groups.
all.zh: 個人票每位定價一百七十五美元，可容納十位賓客的預訂桌則為一千六百美元，提供團體些許優惠。

all.en: All ticket purchases and donations made to the foundation are fully tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law, and official receipts will be issued within thirty days of the event.
all.zh: 所有購票及對基金會的捐款，在法律允許範圍內皆可全額抵稅，正式收據將於活動結束後三十天內開立。

all.en: For organizations interested in deeper engagement, we offer three distinct sponsorship tiers designed to align with various philanthropy budgets and visibility goals.
all.zh: 對於有意更深入參與的組織，我們提供三種不同的贊助級別，旨在配合各種慈善預算與曝光目標。

all.en: Platinum Sponsors, contributing 25,000 dollars or more, will receive two premium tables, full-page color recognition in the program booklet, and prominent logo placement on all event signage.
all.zh: 白金級贊助商捐款二萬五千美元以上，將獲得兩張頂級桌位、活動手冊全頁彩色致謝，以及在所有活動標識上顯著的標誌呈現。

all.en: Gold Sponsors at the 10,000-dollar level will be allocated one reserved table, a half-page acknowledgment, and verbal recognition during the welcome address by our executive director.
all.zh: 金級贊助商捐款一萬美元，將獲分配一張預訂桌、半頁致謝版面，以及由執行長在歡迎致詞中口頭致意。

all.en: Silver Sponsors, whose contribution starts at 5,000 dollars, will be entitled to four complimentary tickets and a quarter-page mention in our printed materials and digital newsletter.
all.zh: 銀級贊助商捐款五千美元起，將享有四張免費入場券，以及在我們的印刷品與電子報中四分之一頁的提及。

all.en: A highlight of the evening will be our silent auction, featuring over sixty exclusive items donated by local businesses, artists, and longtime supporters of the foundation.
all.zh: 當晚的亮點將是我們的無聲拍賣會，展出超過六十件由當地企業、藝術家及基金會長期支持者所捐贈的獨家物品。

all.en: Auction items range from luxury weekend getaways and fine dining experiences to original artwork, signed first-edition novels, and a private cooking class for eight people.
all.zh: 拍賣物品從豪華週末度假套裝、高級餐飲體驗，到原創藝術作品、簽名首版小說，以及八人份的私人烹飪課程，應有盡有。

all.en: Bidding will open at 7:00 p.m. and close promptly at 9:45 p.m., with winners announced immediately afterward and items available for collection that same night.
all.zh: 競標將於晚間七點開始，並於九點四十五分準時結束，得標者將立即公布，物品可於當晚領取。

all.en: Guests who are unable to attend in person are warmly encouraged to participate remotely through our online giving platform, where every contribution, large or small, makes a meaningful difference.
all.zh: 無法親自出席的賓客，我們誠摯鼓勵您透過線上捐款平台遠端參與，每一筆捐款，無論大小，都能帶來有意義的改變。

all.en: To RSVP, please visit our official website at www.brightpathliteracy.org/gala2026 and complete the registration form no later than Friday, October 3.
all.zh: 如欲回覆出席意願，請於十月三日週五前造訪我們的官方網站 www.brightpathliteracy.org/gala2026 並填妥報名表單。

all.en: Dress code for the evening is formal attire, and complimentary valet parking will be provided at the main entrance of the ballroom for all confirmed attendees.
all.zh: 當晚著裝要求為正式服裝，所有確認出席者皆可於宴會廳正門享用免費代客泊車服務。

all.en: Should you have any questions regarding sponsorship packages, dietary accommodations, or general inquiries, please contact our events coordinator, Ms. Helena Choi, at 555-0142 or events@brightpathliteracy.org.
all.zh: 若您對贊助方案、特殊飲食需求或一般事項有任何疑問，請聯繫我們的活動協調員崔海蓮娜小姐，電話 555-0142 或電郵 events@brightpathliteracy.org。

all.en: Corporate sponsors wishing to discuss customized partnership opportunities are invited to schedule a private consultation with our development director by emailing partnerships@brightpathliteracy.org.
all.zh: 企業贊助商若希望討論客製化合作機會，歡迎透過電郵 partnerships@brightpathliteracy.org 預約與我們的發展總監進行私人諮詢。

all.en: Every dollar raised through this fundraiser directly supports tutoring services, the purchase of age-appropriate books, and ongoing professional training for our dedicated team of volunteer instructors.
all.zh: 透過本次募款活動所募得的每一塊錢，都將直接用於支援輔導服務、購置適齡書籍，以及我們敬業志工教師團隊的持續專業培訓。

all.en: On behalf of the board of trustees, the staff, and most importantly the learners whose lives you help transform, we extend our deepest gratitude for your continued support of our charity.
all.zh: 謹代表董事會、全體員工，以及最重要的、其人生因您而改變的學員們，我們對您持續支持本慈善事業致上最誠摯的謝意。

all.en: Together, we can turn the page on illiteracy and write a brighter chapter for the next generation of readers, learners, and leaders in our community.
all.zh: 讓我們攜手翻轉文盲的篇章，為社區中下一代的讀者、學習者與領袖，譜寫更光明的篇章。

all.en: Volunteer opportunities will also be available during the event, with staff on hand to introduce guests to our year-round tutoring and mentorship initiatives.
all.zh: 活動當晚亦將提供志工招募機會，現場將有同仁向賓客介紹我們全年度的輔導與導師計畫。

all.en: Returning supporters will recognize our updated impact report, which includes detailed metrics on reading proficiency gains and graduation outcomes across all partner schools.
all.zh: 回流的支持者將會看到我們更新後的影響力報告，內含所有合作學校在閱讀能力提升與畢業成果方面的詳盡數據。

all.en: A short documentary film, produced in collaboration with Westbrook Community Media, will premiere during the dessert course to showcase three remarkable learner journeys.
all.zh: 一部與西布魯克社區媒體合作製作的短紀錄片，將於甜點時段首映，呈現三位學員非凡的學習歷程。

all.en: Guests are invited to share photos from the evening on social media using the official hashtag BrightpathGala2026 to extend our message of literacy advocacy.
all.zh: 敬邀賓客使用官方主題標籤 BrightpathGala2026 於社群媒體分享當晚相片，協助擴大本基金會推廣識字的訊息。

all.en: Special recognition awards will be presented to three longtime volunteers whose unwavering commitment has exceeded five hundred service hours over the past three years.
all.zh: 本次將頒發特別表揚獎予三位長期志工，他們堅定不移的投入於過去三年累積超過五百小時的服務時數。

all.en: Attendees with accessibility requirements should notify the events team at least seven business days in advance so that suitable accommodations may be arranged.
all.zh: 有無障礙需求的出席者請於至少七個工作日前通知活動團隊，以便安排適切的協助。

all.en: Complimentary childcare services will be available on site for children aged four to twelve, supervised by certified caregivers from Little Lantern Childcare.
all.zh: 現場將提供免費托兒服務，照顧四至十二歲兒童，並由小燈籠托育中心的合格照護人員負責照看。

all.en: Light refreshments and a curated selection of nonalcoholic beverages will be served during the pre-dinner reception beginning at 6:00 p.m. in the lakeside foyer.
all.zh: 晚宴前的接待時段將自下午六時起於湖畔大廳供應簡式茶點，並精選提供多種無酒精飲品。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you to an unforgettable evening of inspiration, community, and meaningful action in support of literacy for all.
all.zh: 我們期待迎接您共度一個難忘的夜晚，匯聚啟發、社群凝聚與支持全民識字的實質行動。

all.en: Please confirm your attendance by April fifteenth so our event team can finalize the seating chart and dietary arrangements.
all.zh: 請於四月十五日前確認出席，以便活動小組敲定座位安排與餐飲需求。

all.en: Major underwriters of this year's gala include three multinational corporations that have generously matched employee donations dollar for dollar.
all.zh: 本屆晚宴的主要贊助商包括三家跨國企業，慷慨地以一比一的方式捐贈配對員工善款。

all.en: Donations received before the early-bird deadline of August thirty-first will be acknowledged in our quarterly impact newsletter.
all.zh: 於八月三十一日早鳥截止日期前收到的捐款，將於本基金會的季度影響力電子報中致謝。

all.en: Our keynote speaker this year is Dr. Naomi Sutherland, a distinguished researcher whose work in adult literacy has earned international recognition.
all.zh: 今年的主題演講者為娜歐米．薩瑟蘭博士，她在成人識字領域的研究獲得國際肯定。

all.en: Tickets purchased on behalf of educators and full-time students are eligible for a reduced rate of seventy-five dollars each.
all.zh: 為教育工作者與全職學生代購之入場券，可享每張七十五美元的優惠費率。

all.en: Proceeds from the wine pull station will go directly toward funding new mobile learning units serving rural communities.
all.zh: 葡萄酒抽獎攤位的所得將直接用於資助服務偏鄉社區的全新行動學習據點。

all.en: A live testimonial from a recent program graduate, Ms. Rebecca Alvarez, will be presented immediately before the silent auction closes.
all.zh: 近期計畫結業生瑞貝卡．艾瓦雷茲女士將於無聲拍賣結束前親身分享心路歷程。

all.en: Volunteer photographers will document the evening, and a curated highlights album will be shared with all guests within ten business days.
all.zh: 志工攝影師將紀錄當晚活動，精選相簿將於十個工作日內分享予所有賓客。

all.en: Anyone interested in joining the gala planning committee for next year is encouraged to speak with a board member during the reception.
all.zh: 若有意加入明年晚宴籌備委員會者，歡迎於招待時段與任一董事會成員洽談。

all.en: We are deeply honored to receive this year's Civic Partnership Award from the Westbrook Chamber of Commerce in recognition of our community impact.
all.zh: 本基金會深感榮幸獲頒西布魯克商會本年度公民夥伴獎，肯定我們對社區的貢獻。

all.en: Together, your continued generosity allows the Brightpath Literacy Foundation to plant seeds of opportunity that will bear fruit for generations to come.
all.zh: 您持續的慷慨支持，讓光徑識字基金會得以播下機會的種子，將惠及世代相傳。

all.en: Honestly, last year was my first time attending the gala, and I was surprised by how warm and unpretentious the whole crowd felt despite the formal dress code.
all.zh: 老實說，去年是我第一次參加這場晚宴，儘管著裝規定正式，但整個現場的氛圍卻溫暖而毫不做作，這點讓我相當意外。

all.en: My coworker Helen brought her teenage daughter along, and the documentary brought both of them to tears, which made for a really meaningful conversation on the drive home.
all.zh: 我同事 Helen 帶著她十幾歲的女兒一起出席，紀錄片讓母女兩人都掉了眼淚，也讓她們在回家路上有了一段很有意義的對話。

all.en: I usually skip silent auctions because the bidding feels intimidating, but the staff at Brightpath made it really easy to participate even with a small budget.
all.zh: 我通常會跳過無聲拍賣，因為競標讓我覺得有點壓力，但光徑的工作人員讓人即使預算不多也能輕鬆參與。

all.en: If you're thinking about going but feel awkward attending alone, just message me, because honestly half the fun is meeting other people who genuinely care about literacy.
all.zh: 如果你想去但又覺得一個人出席很尷尬，就傳訊給我吧，因為老實說一半的樂趣就在於認識其他真心在乎識字議題的人。

all.en: Last year I won a cooking class in the auction and ended up inviting my parents, who still talk about that night every time we make pasta together.
all.zh: 去年我在拍賣會上標到一堂烹飪課，最後邀了我爸媽一起去，到現在我們每次一起做義大利麵，他們都還會聊起那個晚上。

all.en: A neighbor of mine joined the volunteer tutoring team after attending the gala two years ago, and she now teaches reading every Wednesday evening to a small group of adult learners.
all.zh: 我有位鄰居在兩年前參加完晚宴後加入了志工輔導團隊，她現在每週三晚上會教一小群成人學員閱讀。

all.en: The wine pull is honestly my favorite part of the evening because it's basically a lucky dip for grown-ups, and the proceeds all go to something genuinely worthwhile.
all.zh: 老實說葡萄酒抽獎是我整晚最喜歡的部分，因為它基本上就是大人版的福袋抽獎，而且所得全都用在真正有意義的事情上。

all.en: If you happen to know any teachers, please pass the discounted ticket information along to them, since they often feel they can't justify a gala ticket on an educator's salary.
all.zh: 如果你剛好認識任何老師，請把優惠票的資訊轉告他們，因為老師們常常覺得用教育者的薪水買晚宴的票實在說不過去。

all.en: Several of our learners have told us privately that knowing strangers care enough to dress up and donate on a Saturday night is itself a quiet kind of encouragement.
all.zh: 好幾位學員私下告訴我們，光是知道有陌生人願意在週六晚上盛裝出席並捐款，本身就是一種安靜而溫暖的鼓勵。

all.en: If you cannot make it this year, please consider signing up for our monthly giving program, since even ten dollars a month covers the books for one child for an entire school year.
all.zh: 如果您今年無法出席，請考慮加入我們的每月定期捐款計畫，因為即使每月十美元也足以涵蓋一位孩子一整個學年的書本費用。
